subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-26
subcodes.first_line: I hope that you will be under the protection of God... God has appointed provision for every living creature
subcodes.first_line_orig: امید وارم در صون حمایت الهی باشید و بخدمت نوع انسانی موفق شوید و همیشه
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @compassion; kindness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
